title: In This Shadowland

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Save me, for goodness fades like morning dew
The faithful vanish from this world of pain
In streets where lies cascade like endless rain
And truth has bid its final, soft adieu

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Where are the pure hearts in this shadowland?
When silver tongues speak poison sweet as wine
Who stands against the darkness of our time?
As hope slips through our fingers like dry sand

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: They wear their masks of flattering deceit
With honeyed words that hide their hearts of stone
While those who suffer cry out all alone
And justice stumbles, broken, in the street

sections.label: Bridge
lines: But in the depths of night
A whisper cuts through fear
Ancient promises ring clear
Like stars that pierce the night

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Where are the pure hearts in this shadowland?
When silver tongues speak poison sweet as wine
Who stands against the darkness of our time?
As hope slips through our fingers like dry sand
Though evil stalks the corners of our days
And virtue seems a dream we can't recall
Your truth remains, a fortress through it all
A light that darkness cannot wash away
When faith grows dim and shadows gather near
Your words endure, a flame that burns so clear

epigraph: with flattering lips and with a double heart do they speak
